design_archetype: JEWEL & LUXURY mixed with ORGANIC & EARTHY
theme: Dark Theme (Primary) with high-contrast Light Theme sections for rhythm

fonts.headings: Cormorant Garamond (or Playfair Display) - Elegant, high-end editorial feel.
fonts.body: Manrope (or DM Sans) - Clean, highly legible, modern geometry.
fonts.mono_accents: JetBrains Mono - Used sparingly for overlines, filters, or tiny tech details (e.g., 'EST. 1980', 'FILTRES').

rules.headings: Use tracking-tight to tracking-tighter for large headings. Never use Inter or standard Sans for headings. Never default to 'Bold' blindly—use font-light for massive hero text and font-black for smaller assertive titles.
rules.body: Loose line-height (leading-relaxed), prioritize legibility. Keep paragraph widths narrow (max-w-prose).

rules.contrast: Do not use pure #000000. Text must meet APCA contrast standards. Use off-white (#F5F2EB) instead of pure white for a more natural, organic feel.
rules.accents: Use the gold (#c9a227) strictly for critical actions (CTAs), borders, or tiny visual indicators. Do not overuse it.
rules.gradients: Do NOT use linear or radial color gradients as backgrounds. Rely on solid colors and grain textures to create depth.

visual_enhancers.texture: MANDATORY: Implement a fixed, pointer-events-none noise/grain overlay across the entire site (opacity-5 to opacity-10) to give the digital space a tactile, physical 'leather-like' or 'paper-like' feel.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 1px borders (border-[#c9a227]/20) to separate sections, avoiding soft heavy shadows. This creates a refined, high-end editorial look.
visual_enhancers.hover_states: Hover states on cards/images should feature a slow image scale-up inside an overflow-hidden container, paired with a subtle brightness shift. Do not rely on generic shadow-lg on hover.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: For the sticky navigation: Use the 'Crystal' variant. bg-[#1a2f23]/60 with backdrop-blur-xl, and a delicate 1px bottom border border-white/10.

layouts_and_grids.general_spacing: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use massive padding between sections (py-24 or py-32) to let the craftsmanship breathe.
layouts_and_grids.hero: Asymmetrical layout. Large, expressive typography dominating one side, with a deep, moody cinematic background or an offset image block.
layouts_and_grids.savoir_faire_bento: MODE A: 'TETRIS' GRID. Do not use 4 equal columns. Use a 12-column grid. Example: Auto (col-span-12 md:col-span-7 row-span-2), Moto (col-span-12 md:col-span-5 row-span-1), Nautisme (col-span-12 md:col-span-5 row-span-1), Mobilier (col-span-12 md:col-span-7 row-span-1).
layouts_and_grids.gallery: Masonry or staggered asymmetrical grid. Never perfectly uniform squares. Leave negative space.
layouts_and_grids.contact: Clean, wide form layout, minimalist borders, background matching the section (no floating 'white boxes' in dark sections).

motion_and_interactions.scrolling: Use 'lenis' or custom smooth scrolling to make the page scroll feel heavy, deliberate, and premium.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Use 'framer-motion' for staggered fade-ups on text and images as they enter the viewport. Keep easing smooth (e.g., cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)).
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: CTAs should have a subtle background fill or line-drawing effect on hover.

components_strategy.ui_library: Use customized Shadcn UI components for complex logic (Contact form, Dropdowns/Selects for gallery filters) but strip the default 'SaaS/Vercel' look. Replace rounded borders with sharp (rounded-none or rounded-sm) corners and adapt to the color palette.
components_strategy.buttons: Flat, rectangular (rounded-none), sharp. Usually transparent with a 1px solid gold border and gold text, filling with gold and dark text on hover.
components_strategy.cards: Cardless design. Rely on images and typography separated by whitespace or thin 1px dividing lines.

hero_or_craftsmanship.description: Close-up of tools and materials on a leather crafting workspace, showing the artisanal touch.

savoir_faire_auto.description: Classic car brown leather interior with steering wheel.

savoir_faire_moto.description: Detailed shot of a brown leather motorcycle seat.

savoir_faire_nautisme.description: Luxury yacht deck overlooking the sea.

gallery_fillers.description: Macro shot of stitching on leather pouch.

media.rules: Ensure all images use object-cover. Desaturate slightly or apply a very subtle #1a2f23 overlay (opacity-10 to 20) to ensure images blend with the brand's dark, moody, and premium aesthetic.

accessibility.focus_states: Must be visible, use the gold accent (#c9a227) for focus rings. offset-2px.
accessibility.aria_labels: All gallery filters and form inputs must have proper ARIA attributes.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for all Framer Motion and Lenis scroll effects.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'framer-motion' for staggered entrance animations and scroll reveals.
Install 'lucide-react' for crisp, elegant icons (use strokes, not filled).
In your CSS, add a subtle noise background class. Apply it to the body or a fixed overlay div to prevent the background from feeling like flat digital colors.
Use <section> blocks with distinct background shifts. e.g., Hero (Dark), Savoir-Faire (Dark), Engagement (Light/Sand to create tension), Gallery (Dark).
Do NOT center align everything. The text for 'Savoir-Faire' and 'Engagement' should be left-aligned and strictly typographic.
Build the gallery with a filtering system using standard React state, preserving the previous capabilities.
The logo must be preserved. Create a space for it in the nav: A circular element (w-12 h-12) representing the 'dark green circle with sewing machine'.
Create JS files for components and pages (as requested, the project uses .js).
Remember to add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) where appropriate.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Always use modern button styles, in this case sharp corners with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Components MUST use named exports, Pages MUST use default exports.
